reviewer_sources.query: Go to https://www.getevident.co/skin/serums/best-vitamin-c-serum and extract every vitamin C serum they tested and ranked. For each product get: full product name, their ranking or award, price, vitamin C concentration, stability score or notes, pros with specific measurements, cons with specific flaws.

Go to https://www.allure.com/gallery/get-brighter-skin-vitamin-c and extract every vitamin C serum recommended. For each product get: full product name, the category or award (e.g. Best Overall, Best for Sensitive Skin), price, key ingredients, pros with specific details from the review, cons or caveats mentioned.

Go to https://www.dermstore.com/blog/top_ten/best-vitamin-c-serums and extract every vitamin C serum listed. For each product get: full product name, ranking or category, price, key ingredients, what dermatologists say about it, pros and cons.

Go to https://www.healthline.com/health/beauty-skin-care/best-vitamin-c-serum/ and extract every vitamin C serum recommended. For each product get: full product name, category or award, price, active ingredients and concentration, pros with specifics, cons or warnings.

Search for 'NBC Select best vitamin C serums 2026 tested reviewed' to find their roundup page. Extract every vitamin C serum they tested. For each product get: full product name, ranking or award, price, test results or scores, pros with specifics, cons.
